title: Sour Silky Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry dish made with sour and silky ingredients. Great for a weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add your stir-fry vegetables and cook until they are tender-crisp.
Add 2 tablespoons of silky soy sauce and stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of sour tomatoes and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
